name: @parisgroup-ai/claude-statusline
description: Claude Code statusline — ParisGroup flavor. Renders model, project, git, cost, tokens, and context-window percent.

scripts.prelint: command -v shellcheck >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'shellcheck not found. Install: brew install shellcheck (macOS) or apt-get install shellcheck (Debian).' >&2; exit 127; }
scripts.pretest: command -v bats >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'bats not found. Install: brew install bats-core (macOS) or apt-get install bats (Debian).' >&2; exit 127; }

author: Paris Group <hello@parisgroup.ai>
